title: Domain 5: Security, Compliance, and Governance for AI Solutions (14%)
description: Securing the data and models in AI solutions, and governing them: access control, encryption, data and model governance, compliance, and monitoring.

lessons.title: Securing AI Data and Models
objectives: Apply IAM, encryption, and the shared responsibility model to AI workloads
Explain how Bedrock keeps your data private
Pick services that protect data used with AI (KMS, Macie, PrivateLink)

lessons.title: Governance, Compliance, and Monitoring
objectives: Distinguish data governance from model governance
Find compliance information with AWS Artifact and AI Service Cards
Use CloudTrail and CloudWatch to audit and monitor AI usage
